actions.name: Rush
actions.description:
The user selects a Movement Type they possess and make a Demanding Skill Check with that Movement Type's associated Skill.

On a success, the user gains +1m per 2 DoS to that Movement Score for the rest of the round (default 0 at 1 DoS). The user may elect to spend up to 10 PP to increase the result by +10 times by the number of PP spent.
